about.headline: About me
about.description: Hi, I'm a german speaking Frontend Developer based in Austria. Motivated by the limitless opportunities within IT, I am excited about vrafting visually captivating and intuitive websites an applications.

content.paragraph1: Flexible in terms of working enviroments, I can work effectively both on-site in Austria and remotely
content.paragraph2: I am open-minded and always looking for personal challenges to constantly improve my knowledge and skills
content.paragraph3: In my profession, programming isn't just about writing code: it's a creative form of problem-solving, I take pride in my ability to distill complex technical challenges into simple, user-friendly solutions. This way, i help you achieve your goals and brong your vision to life

skills.headline: Skills
skills.description: My journey has involved working on diverse projects, employing a range of frontend technologies and concepts. I am open to embracing new technologies and methodologies to Continously enhance my skills and stay ahead in the ever-evolving landscape of web development.
skills.paragraph: Fell free to contact me. I look forward to expanding on my previous knowledge

projects.headline: Portfolio
projects.paragraph: Explore a selection of my work here - Interact with projects to see my skills in action.

testimonials.headline: What my colleagues say about me

contact.headline: Let's work together
contact.paragraph: Contact me through this form, I am interested in hearing from you, knowing your ideas and contributing to your projects with my work.
